title: Stocks drop as AI rally pauses, US-Iran peace talks stall
description: SINGAPORE: Asian share markets slid on Friday as investors took profits on technology stocks and turned defensive ahead of the weekend, wary of the flare-up in Middle East hostilities as US-Iran peace talks remain in limbo.

title: The $200 Billion Reason Amazon Could Be an Overlooked AI Winner
description: The e-commerce and cloud giant's record spending is funding a fast-growing chip business that investors arguably aren't giving enough credit.

title: China bets on AI to promote President Xi Jinping's thinking
description: The project, known as "Xinhua Yudian," meaning Xinhua lexicon, is "an intelligent agent for learning, researching, and disseminating Xi ⁠Jinping Thought ⁠on Socialism with Chinese Characteristics for a New Era," the company said.

title: Wyoming governor signs executive order to guide AI data center development
description: Wyoming Governor Mark Gordon signed an executive order June 3 giving state agencies 60 days to draft policy for large AI data centers. The state already hosts a 1.8 GW campus and saw CleanSpark outbid Microsoft for a Cheyenne energy site.

title: Capital Region community colleges hold symposium to discuss AI in classrooms
description: Five Capital Region community colleges gathered for a symposium on Thursday to discuss artificial intelligence in the classroom. Hosted by Hudson Valley Community College, SUNY Adirondack, Columbia-Greene, Fulton-Montgomery, SUNY Schenectady also joined the conversation.
